# Metricus

> AI visibility reports for brands — find out what ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and 5 other AI platforms say about your brand, and how to fix it.

Metricus helps businesses understand and improve how they appear in AI-generated answers. When people ask AI chatbots for recommendations, Metricus tells you whether your brand is mentioned, what AI gets wrong about you, and exactly how to fix it.

We query each AI platform hundreds of times to find real patterns (not noise), then deliver a clear report with visibility scores, exact AI quotes, factual errors, competitor rankings, and a prioritized action plan. Reports are delivered within 24 hours.

## Products

- [AI Brand Visibility Report](https://metricusapp.com/): One-time AI visibility audit across 8 AI engines — ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, AI Overviews, Grok, DeepSeek, and Copilot. Covers mention rate, positioning, citations, factual accuracy, and competitor comparisons. From $49.
- [Sample Report](https://metricusapp.com/example-report/): Free sample report showing what a full AI visibility audit looks like, using Bank of America as an example.

## Pricing

Three one-time tiers (not a subscription):
- Snapshot ($49): 3 AI engines, 5 queries, 2 competitors, visibility score, top quotes, accuracy summary.
- Deep Dive ($149): All 8 AI engines, 20 queries, 5 competitors, full accuracy audit, citation tracking, top 5 prioritized actions.
- Full Arsenal ($349): All 8 AI engines, 50 queries, 10 competitors, unlimited actions, executive summary PDF, regional breakdown (US/EU/APAC).

100% money-back guarantee: if your report doesn't surface at least 3 actionable insights, full refund.

## Research

- [We Asked 8 AI Chatbots to Recommend a CRM](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-chatbot-recommendations/): Only 2 out of 8 AI chatbots mentioned the market leader when asked to recommend a CRM.
- [Your SEO Strategy Is Ignoring 37% of Buyers](https://metricusapp.com/blog/seo-ignoring-buyers/): A growing share of B2B buyers ask AI before they open Google.
- [AI Is Getting Your Pricing Wrong](https://metricusapp.com/blog/ai-getting-pricing-wrong/): 72% of brands audited had at least one factual error in AI answers.
